items.about_product: Make sure this fits by entering your model number. | Scientific exploration is easy with this durable tabletop station | Encourage scientific curiosity and observation | Features 4x magnification and removable legs | Station measures 7”H x 9” in diameter | Ages 3+
items.technical_details: Encourage young children to observe objects up close and in detail with this durable tabletop station. Features 4x magnification and removable legs for quick and convenient storage. Station measures 7”H x 9” in diameter. | 3.13 pounds (View shipping rates and policies)
items.description: 4x Magnifier with Tripod Stand:  See clearly and comfortably with this Learning Resources Tabletop Magnifier. Ideal for seniors, hobbyists, and anyone needing magnification for reading, close-up work, or low vision.  Stable tripod base ensures hands-free viewing.  Shop now for improved vision and ease of use!

RESOLUTION: Standard return policy applies, offering full refund to the original payment method since items are within the return window and in original condition. TRADE-OFF: No alternative compensation or exception was needed, as all policy criteria for a full refund were met.
